meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Setup to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn to use Claude Code and Antigravity to rapidly prototype SaaS ideas. An advanced checklist for founders to overcome the 'no project ideas' barrier.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the perfect idea. Use Claude Code to rapidly iterate through market gaps by automating the scaffolding of micro-SaaS prototypes. By leveraging Antigravity to map business logic to functional code, you convert abstract pain points into high-velocity MVPs, allowing you to validate revenue potential in hours, not months.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of founders. You have the hunger to ship, but the signal-to-noise ratio in the market is deafening, leaving you paralyzed by the 'no project ideas' paradox. Most founders spend weeks theorizing, only to build products nobody wants. The elite minority, however, treat ideas as disposable experiments.

Today, we shift your workflow from architecting in your head to shipping in the terminal. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you gain an autonomous engineering partner that turns raw market observations into executable codebases. We aren't just writing scripts; we are building a high-speed engine for continuous product validation.

steps.title: Define Market Pain with Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing code, use Antigravity to synthesize fragmented market feedback into a structured product specification.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following list of customer complaints: [INSERT FEEDBACK]. Extract the top 3 recurring pain points and propose a micro-SaaS solution for each, prioritizing high-willingness-to-pay segments.

steps.title: Initialize the Lean MVP Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate a production-ready boilerplate based on your chosen idea.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory structure and tech stack recommendation for a focused SaaS MVP using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a Next.js project with the structure defined by Antigravity and install necessary dependencies.'

steps.title: Implement Core Revenue Logic
steps.description: Focus exclusively on the feature that solves the primary user pain point to ensure rapid time-to-value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a data schema for a user-facing dashboard that tracks the primary pain point metric identified in step 1.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement the core logic to capture and display user data as defined in the schema, ensuring strict type safety.'

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: Ensure your MVP doesn't break by instructing Claude to write tests for your critical path.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of Playwright tests for the critical user onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Run the Playwright suite and fix any identified regressions in the auth and data display modules.'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push to production to start gathering real user feedback immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment checklist for a Vercel production build, including environment variable mapping.

pro_tips: Treat every Claude Code session as a distinct git branch; if the logic hallucinates, roll back immediately rather than correcting in-place.
Use Antigravity to create a 'System Prompt' file in your root directory; it forces Claude Code to maintain your specific architectural constraints across all files.
Always ask Claude to 'explain the architectural trade-offs' before it writes code to avoid over-engineering your MVP.
Leverage Claude Code to write your marketing copy based on the code's features, ensuring your landing page matches the product's actual capabilities.
Before finalizing a feature, ask Claude to 'identify potential security vulnerabilities or performance bottlenecks' to keep your MVP lean and safe.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, use your first 10 user sessions to gather qualitative feedback and repeat the loop to iterate based on real-world usage.
content.conversion_block: Stop overthinking and start shipping. Our framework ensures you spend 90% of your time on market validation and 10% on code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
